column3: Record Revenue to date and ATT to date is something to celebrate.  However, 17 performances versus 14-16 so we should normalize by looking per performance.
Per performance revenue for FY26 is best season since FY23.  Interesting to note how much Budget per performance has grown every year from FY23 to FY26…
Hall capacity is +7% (not premium seats) and ATP flat from FY23 to FY26, so why is Budget per performance +42%?  Where can that come from?  ATP would need to be >$100 to achieve this.
Looking at FY26 vs FY24, revenue is up 17% driven entirely by ATP. (ATT is flat)  Was there a lot of discounting to fill the hall FY24 and FY25?
